/usr/bin/cc -D_GNU_SOURCE -pthread -std=c99 -Wall -O2 -g   -DPTLS_HAVE_FUSION=1 -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -rdynamic "CMakeFiles/test-fusion.t.dir/deps/picotest/picotest.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test-fusion.t.dir/lib/picotls.c.o" "CMakeFiles/test-fusion.t.dir/t/fusion.c.o" -o test-fusion.t  libpicotls-minicrypto.a libpicotls-core.a
